name: Artichoke Shrimp Spread
recipeIngredient: -2 cans artichoke hearts; drain and chop fine
-1 3/4 lb cooked shrimp; chopped fine (70-90 to the pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on both halves of sliced Poor Boy bread.
3. Drizzle with additional olive oil.
4. Cut into 1-1/2 inch slices and place in an oven preheated to 300°F (150°C).
5. Bake for 5 to 8 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
